company.name: GridFlow Energy
company.description: GridFlow is forecasting and optimization software for electric utilities and large energy buyers. Our models balance renewable supply against demand in real time, cutting curtailment and peak-demand costs. 60 utilities and industrial buyers run GridFlow across 14 states.

pitch_claims.unique_selling_point: Physics-informed forecasting that ingests SCADA telemetry and beats incumbent load forecasts by 18% MAPE in head-to-head pilots.

customer_revenue_breakdown.note: 5-year contract signed 2025; well-diversified base beyond it.
Multi-year contracts, average remaining term 38 months.

unit_economics.note: Enterprise utility motion; high contract values and 96% logo retention drive strong LTV:CAC.

legal.ip_status: 2 patents granted on physics-informed forecasting; trade-secret protections on telemetry pipeline. All IP assigned to company.

litigation.value: No active lawsuits, regulatory actions, or pending disputes.

regulatory_compliance.nerc_cip: NERC CIP aligned; passed two utility customer security reviews in 2025.
regulatory_compliance.data_privacy: Telemetry data governed by signed data-sharing agreements; encrypted end to end.
regulatory_compliance.licensing: Software vendor to utilities — fully compliant; no operating license required.

cap_table.note: Clean. 1x non-participating preferred, standard protective provisions.

tech_stack.infrastructure: Kubernetes on GCP, multi-region, Kafka streaming ingestion

security.last_penetration_test: Independent penetration test completed 2026-01 by Bishop Fox; all findings remediated.
security.pii_storage: Minimal PII; operational telemetry encrypted at rest with AES-256.
security.encryption_at_rest: AES-256; key management via cloud KMS.
security.mfa: MFA and SSO enforced; role-based access controls audited quarterly.

architecture.scalability: Processes 1.1M telemetry points/sec at peak; horizontally autoscaled.
architecture.tech_debt_assessment: LOW — 80% test coverage, clear service ownership.

actual_market_trends.sector_growth: Grid-software spend grew 27% in 2025 driven by renewable interconnection and electrification.
actual_market_trends.policy_tailwinds: Federal grid-resilience funding and rising renewable penetration expand the buyer base.
actual_market_trends.demand: Utility demand for forecasting tools is accelerating as variable generation grows.

market.positioning: GridFlow wins on forecast accuracy and SCADA-native integration; incumbents focus on customer engagement, not real-time optimization.

ceo.name: Marcus Webb
ceo.previous_company: Grid operations lead at a regional ISO (7 years)
ceo.assessment: Rare combination of utility-operations credibility and software execution.

cto.name: Lena Hofmann
cto.previous: Senior research engineer, national grid lab
cto.assessment: Authored the forecasting models; deep domain moat.

team_gaps: Customer-success org scaling behind bookings — two senior hires in progress.

deal_summary.existing_investor_participation: Lowercarbon and Congruent both exercising pro-rata.
